title: [lora_l2.c:517] lora_config stack-local struct passed by pointer without lifetime check
description:
Completeness: API contract verification category.

At line 517-525, a stack-local struct lora_modem_config is created and passed to lora_config():


The comment at line 498-500 states: 'Stack-local struct is safe: lora_config() copies the values (see sx12xx_lora_config memcpy, rylr_config field reads) and does not retain a pointer.'

However, this claim is driver-specific:
- sx12xx: confirmed to copy
- rylr: confirmed to copy
- Other drivers (sx127x, llcc68, etc.): not verified

If a new LoRa driver retains the config pointer for later async use, this would be use-after-free.

Fix: Make lora_modem_config static or module-global to eliminate lifetime concern, or add Kconfig validation that only known-safe drivers are used.
close_reason: Fixed: changed lora_modem_config to static to eliminate stack lifetime concerns
